title: Benchmark Parameters Schema
description: Schema for expanded benchmark parameter arrays produced by the multiplex subproject.  The outer array represents iterations and the inner array contains the parameters for each iteration.

items.description: An iteration consisting of one or more benchmark parameters.  Each iteration represents a unique combination of parameter values to test.
A single benchmark parameter with an argument name, value, and optional metadata.

arg.description: The parameter argument name passed to the benchmark engine.

val.description: The value for this parameter argument.

role.description: The engine role this parameter applies to.  'client' and 'server' restrict the parameter to that role, while 'all' applies it to every engine.

uuid.description: A unique identifier for this parameter instance, used for CDM indexing and result tracking.

id.description: A human-readable identifier for this parameter within its iteration.
